name: Le Petit Prince — Multilingual Naturalistic fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds003643) of 112 participants listening to an audiobook of 'The Little Prince' in English, Chinese, and French during fMRI. A multilingual naturalistic language resource for cross-language comprehension.
citation: Li J, et al. (2022). Le Petit Prince multilingual naturalistic fMRI corpus. Scientific Data, 9, 530.
